zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Legatt IV於大約1495年出生在英國艾可達根哈姆時，他的父親Thomas Legatt III35歲，母親Catherine Wilgoos27歲。他於1544年與Catherine Wilson在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1555年1月18日在英國艾可霍其享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Legatt IV于大约1495年出生在英国艾可達根哈姆时，他的父亲Thomas Legatt III35岁，母亲Catherine Wilgoos27岁。他于1544年与Catherine Wilson在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1555年1月18日在英国艾可霍其享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Legatt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leggett
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English legat, legate ‘delegate, ambassador, deputy’ (Old French legat), Latin legatus ‘one who is appointed or ordained’.
English: variant of   Legard  , especially in Sussex, perhaps through confusion of the two names.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Legatt IV was born about 1495, in Dagenham, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Legatt III, was 35 and his mother, Catherine Wilgoos, was 27. He married Catherine Wilson in 1544, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 18 January 1555, in Hornchurch, Essex, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Legatt IV est né environ 1495, à Dagenham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Legatt III, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Catherine Wilgoos, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Wilson en 1544, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1555, à Hornchurch, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Legatt IV um 1495 in Dagenham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Legatt III 35 und seine Mutter Catherine Wilgoos 27. Er hat 1544 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Catherine Wilson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 18. Januar 1555 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Hornchurch, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Legatt IV è nato il circa 1495 nel Dagenham, Essex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Legatt III, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Wilgoos, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Wilson nel 1544, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 18 gennaio 1555, nel Hornchurch, Essex, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Legatt IVが約1495年にイギリスエセックスダジェンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Legatt IIIは35歳，母Catherine Wilgoosは27歳であった。1544年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでCatherine Wilsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1555年1月18日にイギリスエセックスホールンチャーチで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Legatt IV(이)가 대략 1495년 영국 에세스 다겐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Legatt III(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Wilgoos(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Catherine Wilson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1555년 1월 18일 영국 에세스 호른c후르치에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Legatt IV nasceu aproximadamente 1495, em Dagenham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Legatt III, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Wilgoos, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Wilson em 1544, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1555, em Hornchurch, Essex, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Legatt IV родился около 1495 г. в местности дадженам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Legatt III было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Wilgoos, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Wilson в 1544 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 18 января 1555 г. в местности хаурнчурч, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Legatt IV nació aproximadamente 1495, en Dagenham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Legatt III, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Catherine Wilgoos, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Catherine Wilson en 1544, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 18 de enero de 1555, en Hornchurch, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
